name: six-wise-minds
description: A multi-agent decision council Skill for fuzzy decisions, with six-role deliberation, traceability, safety gates, and evaluation assets.

interface.longDescription: Six Wise Minds is a document-based Agent Skill protocol for fuzzy decisions. It uses a Chair, six bounded thinking roles, a Blue Secretary process audit, one-repair anti-loop policy, trace summaries, safety gates, schemas, and evaluation assets.
defaultPrompt: Use Six Wise Minds to clarify this decision.
Run a six-role deliberation on this fuzzy issue.
Stress-test this product decision with Six Wise Minds.
